---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the pattern, docs, or developer experience
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What's missing or could be better?

## Proposed change

What you'd like to see. If it relates to a Roadmap item (multi-deployment,
correlated synthetic data, the OpenTelemetry production source), mention it.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you ruled out and why.
